creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On Mon, 6 Jan 2014 08:00:35 +0100
Marcus von Appen <mva@FreeBSD.org> wrote:

> On, Mon Dec 02, 2013, Marcus von Appen wrote:
> 
> >
> > It looks like the port requires OpenGL headers to compile
> > successfully. It builds for me, when I add USE_GL=yes.
> >
> > Can you please check, if this is a required or optional dependency?
> > Can you also add proper STAGEDIR support?
> >
> 
> This port as well as ports/181244 (devel/ocl-id) are required for
> ports/171914 (devel/pocl). Please let me know about the required
> changes from above.
> 
> Thanks
> Marcus

Thanks for consideration.

I'm under harsh time constraints at the moment, sorry for the delay in
response.

As I checked, you're correct. USE_GL=yes is a sine conditio qua non in
this case and needs to be applied.

Please postpone the commit, I will contact you regarding another issue
on that.

Oliver
